### Post by neill on 2008-05-17
hi

i'm using server 8.04 and having trouble running cron jobs

here's the crontab: /var/spool/cron/crontabs/root

```
# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - edit the master and reinstall.
# (/tmp/crontab.HJI1he/crontab installed on Wed May 14 23:30:26 2008)
# (Cron version -- $Id: crontab.c,v 2.13 1994/01/17 03:20:37 vixie Exp $)
5 18 * * * /etc/webmin/cron/tempdelete.pl
@hourly antivir --update  #antivir update
57 3 * * * /home/neill/antivir.sh        #nightly antivir run
0,31 4 * * * /etc/webmin/time/sync.pl
43 4 * * * logwatch #logwatch
```

if i run any of the above manually they all do *exactly *as i expect

 cron seems to be running

```
neill@bowzer:~$ ps aux | grep cron
root      5883  0.0  0.0   2104   900 ?        Ss   May14   0:00 /usr/sbin/cron
neill    10477  0.0  0.0   3004   752 pts/0    R+   13:39   0:00 grep cron
```

but the log file has this

/var/log/cron.log

```
May 17 10:00:01 bowzer CRON[10133]: User account has expired
May 17 10:17:01 bowzer CRON[10134]: User account has expired
May 17 11:00:01 bowzer CRON[10156]: User account has expired
May 17 11:17:01 bowzer CRON[10158]: User account has expired
May 17 12:00:01 bowzer CRON[10181]: User account has expired
May 17 12:17:01 bowzer CRON[10196]: User account has expired
May 17 13:00:01 bowzer CRON[10215]: User account has expired
May 17 13:17:01 bowzer CRON[10336]: User account has expired
```

and not much else

needless to say the jobs don't run when they should

:(

anyone any idea what's going on ???

ta

/neill

---

### Post by koenn on 2008-05-17
did you create those cron jobs a user "bowzer" and has that account since been deleted ?

---

### Post by neill on 2008-05-18
bowzer is the server name

the jobs were created via the webmin inteface - but i think i've found the problem
for whatever reason the root account was shown as expiraing in 1970 (unix zear 0 i believe)
i corrected that and it seems to be working now

thanks
